ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the user's security question */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "two_factor_secret" TEXT /* Two-factor authentication secret */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user's account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money transacted (positive for deposits, negative for withdrawals) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., food, transportation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_security_questions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., food, transportation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount spent in the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "category")
)
